item.title: Open Coding Agents: Fast, accessible coding agents that adapt to any repo
item.description: SERA is the first in our family of Open Coding Agents, achieving state-of-the-art performance at low cost.

item.description: Introducing MolmoBot and MolmoSpaces, an open foundation for training real-world robots to advance science.
